text:
ACO Identifier 

 CLNDR_YR 
 Year of ACO Source Record

 Provider Class 

 ORG_TIN 
 Billing TIN of ACO Participant 

 ORG_NPI 
 National Provider Identifier (NPI) for Organization

 NPI for Practitioner
